001/*
002 * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more
003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.commons.conversion;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.ReflectionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.ThrowableUtils.*;
022import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
023
024import java.lang.reflect.*;
025import java.math.*;
026import java.nio.charset.*;
027import java.util.*;
028import java.util.concurrent.atomic.*;
029
030import org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.*;
031
032/**
033 * A concrete {@link CachingConverter} that supports common type conversions without
034 * requiring a {@code MarshallingContext} or {@code MarshallingSession}.
035 *
036 * <p>
037 * The following conversions are supported:
038 *
039 * <table class='styled'>
040 *    <tr><th>Input type</th><th>Output type</th><th>Notes</th></tr>
041 *    <tr>
042 *       <td>Any type</td>
043 *       <td>Same or supertype</td>
044 *       <td>Identity / widening (no-op cast)</td>
045 *    </tr>
046 *    <tr>
047 *       <td>{@link Number}</td>
048 *       <td>
049 *          {@link Integer}, {@link Long}, {@link Short}, {@link Float}, {@link Double}, {@link Byte},
050 *          {@link AtomicInteger}, {@link AtomicLong}, {@link BigDecimal}, {@link BigInteger},
051 *          and primitive equivalents
052 *       </td>
053 *       <td>Narrowing/widening numeric conversion</td>
054 *    </tr>
055 *    <tr>
056 *       <td>{@link Boolean}</td>
057 *       <td>{@link Number} types (including {@link BigDecimal}, {@link BigInteger})</td>
058 *       <td><c>true=1, false=0</c></td>
059 *    </tr>
060 *    <tr>
061 *       <td>{@link CharSequence}</td>
062 *       <td>{@link Number} types</td>
063 *       <td>Parsed via {@link org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils#parseNumber(String, Class)};
064 *          empty string or {@code "null"} returns <jk>null</jk></td>
065 *    </tr>
066 *    <tr>
067 *       <td>{@link Number}</td>
068 *       <td>{@link Boolean}</td>
069 *       <td><c>intValue() != 0</c></td>
070 *    </tr>
071 *    <tr>
072 *       <td>{@link CharSequence}</td>
073 *       <td>{@link Boolean}</td>
074 *       <td>{@link Boolean#valueOf(String)}</td>
075 *    </tr>
076 *    <tr>
077 *       <td>{@link CharSequence} (length 1)</td>
078 *       <td>{@link Character}</td>
079 *       <td><c>charAt(0)</c></td>
080 *    </tr>
081 *    <tr>
082 *       <td>{@link Number}</td>
083 *       <td>{@link Character}</td>
084 *       <td>First character of {@code toString()} (e.g. {@code 65} → {@code '6'})</td>
085 *    </tr>
086 *    <tr>
087 *       <td>Any</td>
088 *       <td>{@link String}</td>
089 *       <td>{@link Object#toString()}, with array support via {@link Arrays#toString(Object[])}</td>
090 *    </tr>
091 *    <tr>
092 *       <td>{@link CharSequence}</td>
093 *       <td>{@code byte[]}</td>
094 *       <td>UTF-8 encoding via {@link String#getBytes(java.nio.charset.Charset)}</td>
095 *    </tr>
096 *    <tr>
097 *       <td>{@link CharSequence}</td>
098 *       <td>Any {@link Enum}</td>
099 *       <td>{@link Enum#valueOf(Class, String)}</td>
100 *    </tr>
101 *    <tr>
102 *       <td>{@link Collection} or array</td>
103 *       <td>{@link Collection} subtype</td>
104 *       <td>Copies elements; element type from <c>args[0]</c></td>
105 *    </tr>
106 *    <tr>
107 *       <td>{@link Map}</td>
108 *       <td>{@link Map} subtype</td>
109 *       <td>Copies entries; key type from <c>args[0]</c>, value type from <c>args[1]</c></td>
110 *    </tr>
111 *    <tr>
112 *       <td>{@link Collection} or array</td>
113 *       <td>Array type</td>
114 *       <td>Element type from <c>outType.getComponentType()</c></td>
115 *    </tr>
116 *    <tr>
117 *       <td>{@link String}</td>
118 *       <td>{@link TimeZone}</td>
119 *       <td>{@link TimeZone#getTimeZone(String)}</td>
120 *    </tr>
121 *    <tr>
122 *       <td>{@link TimeZone}</td>
123 *       <td>{@link String}</td>
124 *       <td>{@link TimeZone#getID()}</td>
125 *    </tr>
126 *    <tr>
127 *       <td>{@link String}</td>
128 *       <td>{@link Locale}</td>
129 *       <td>{@link Locale#forLanguageTag(String)} (underscores converted to hyphens)</td>
130 *    </tr>
131 *    <tr>
132 *       <td>Any</td>
133 *       <td>Any with <c>static T fromString/valueOf/of/from/parse/create/forName/fromValue/builder(X)</c>
134 *          or dynamic <c>fromX/forX/parseX</c> where X is the input class name</td>
135 *       <td>Reflection-based static factory lookup</td>
136 *    </tr>
137 *    <tr>
138 *       <td>Any</td>
139 *       <td>Any with <c>public T(X)</c> constructor</td>
140 *       <td>Reflection-based constructor lookup</td>
141 *    </tr>
142 *    <tr>
143 *       <td>Any with <c>toX()</c> instance method</td>
144 *       <td>Any type X</td>
145 *       <td>Instance method where name matches <c>to</c> + output class name (e.g. <c>toInteger()</c>)</td>
146 *    </tr>
147 * </table>
148 *
149 * <h5 class='section'>Thread Safety:</h5>
150 * <p>
151 * This class is thread-safe. The singleton instance can be safely shared across multiple threads.
152 */
153@SuppressWarnings({
154   "rawtypes", // Raw types necessary for generic conversion dispatch
155   "unchecked", // Type erasure requires unchecked casts throughout conversion logic
156   "java:S3776", // Cognitive complexity of conversion dispatch methods is inherent to the number of supported type pairs
157   "java:S1067", // Complex boolean expressions in conversion checks reflect the natural type hierarchy
158   "java:S1192" // "parse" literal is used in multiple independent Sets/arrays; extracting it would reduce clarity
159})
160public class BasicConverter extends CachingConverter {
161
162   /**
163    * Singleton instance.
164    */
165   public static final BasicConverter INSTANCE = new BasicConverter();
166
167   private static final Set<String> FACTORY_METHOD_NAMES = Set.of(
168      "fromString", "valueOf", "of", "from", "parse", "create", "forName", "fromValue", "builder"
169   );
170
171   private static final Map<Class<?>, Class<?>> PRIMITIVE_TO_WRAPPER = Map.of(
172      boolean.class, Boolean.class,
173      byte.class, Byte.class,
174      char.class, Character.class,
175      double.class, Double.class,
176      float.class, Float.class,
177      int.class, Integer.class,
178      long.class, Long.class,
179      short.class, Short.class
180   );
181
182   /**
183    * Constructor.
184    */
185   protected BasicConverter() {}
186
187   @Override
188   protected <I, O> Conversion<I, O> findConversion(Class<I> inType, Class<O> outType) {
189      var out = outType.isPrimitive() ? (Class<O>) PRIMITIVE_TO_WRAPPER.get(outType) : outType;
190
191      Conversion<I, O> c;
192
193      if ((c = findSpecialConversion(inType, out)) != null) return c;
194
195      if (out.isAssignableFrom(inType) && !Collection.class.isAssignableFrom(out) && !Map.class.isAssignableFrom(out))
196         return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> (O) in;
197
198      if (Number.class.isAssignableFrom(out) && (c = findNumberConversion(inType, out)) != null) return c;
199
200      if (out == Boolean.class && (c = findBooleanConversion(inType)) != null) return c;
201
202      if (out == Character.class && (c = findCharacterConversion(inType)) != null) return c;
203
204      if (out == String.class)
205         return (Conversion<I, O>) findToStringConversion(inType);
206
207      if (out.isEnum() && (c = findEnumConversion(inType, out)) != null) return c;
208
209      if (out == Optional.class && (c = findOptionalConversion()) != null) return c;
210
211      if ((out == OptionalInt.class || out == OptionalLong.class || out == OptionalDouble.class)
212            && (c = findPrimitiveOptionalConversion(out)) != null) return c;
213
214      if (Collection.class.isAssignableFrom(out) && (c = findCollectionConversion(inType, out)) != null) return c;
215
216      if (Map.class.isAssignableFrom(out) && (c = findMapConversion(inType, out)) != null) return c;
217
218      if (out.isArray() && (c = findArrayConversion(inType, out)) != null) return c;
219
220      if ((c = findToXMethod(inType, out)) != null) return c;
221
222      if ((c = findStaticFactory(inType, out)) != null) return c;
223
224      if ((c = findConstructorConversion(inType, out)) != null) return c;
225
226      return null;
227   }
228
229   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
230   // Number conversions
231   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
232
233   private <I, O> Conversion<I, O> findNumberConversion(Class<I> inType, Class<O> outType) {
234      if (Number.class.isAssignableFrom(inType))
235         return findNumberFromNumber(outType);
236      if (inType == Boolean.class)
237         return (Conversion<I, O>) findNumberFromBoolean(outType);
238      if (CharSequence.class.isAssignableFrom(inType))
239         return (Conversion<I, O>) findNumberFromString(outType);
240      return null;
241   }
242
243   private <I, O> Conversion<I, O> findNumberFromNumber(Class<O> outType) {
244      if (outType == Integer.class) return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> (O) Integer.valueOf(((Number) in).intValue());
245      if (outType == Long.class) return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> (O) Long.valueOf(((Number) in).longValue());
246      if (outType == Short.class) return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> (O) Short.valueOf(((Number) in).shortValue());
247      if (outType == Float.class) return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> (O) Float.valueOf(((Number) in).floatValue());
248      if (outType == Double.class) return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> (O) Double.valueOf(((Number) in).doubleValue());
249      if (outType == Byte.class) return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> (O) Byte.valueOf(((Number) in).byteValue());
250      if (outType == AtomicInteger.class) return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> (O) new AtomicInteger(((Number) in).intValue());
251      if (outType == AtomicLong.class) return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> (O) new AtomicLong(((Number) in).longValue());
252      if (outType == BigDecimal.class) return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> (O) new BigDecimal(in.toString());
253      if (outType == BigInteger.class) return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> {
254         var n = (Number) in;
255         if (n instanceof BigDecimal bd) return (O) bd.toBigInteger();
256         if (n instanceof BigInteger bi) return (O) bi;
257         return (O) BigInteger.valueOf(n.longValue());
258      };
259      return null;
260   }
261
262   private <O> Conversion<Boolean, O> findNumberFromBoolean(Class<O> outType) {
263      if (outType == Integer.class) return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> (O) Integer.valueOf(in.booleanValue() ? 1 : 0);
264      if (outType == Long.class) return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> (O) Long.valueOf(in.booleanValue() ? 1L : 0L);
265      if (outType == Short.class) return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> (O) Short.valueOf(in.booleanValue() ? (short) 1 : (short) 0);
266      if (outType == Float.class) return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> (O) Float.valueOf(in.booleanValue() ? 1f : 0f);
267      if (outType == Double.class) return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> (O) Double.valueOf(in.booleanValue() ? 1d : 0d);
268      if (outType == Byte.class) return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> (O) Byte.valueOf(in.booleanValue() ? (byte) 1 : (byte) 0);
269      if (outType == AtomicInteger.class) return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> (O) new AtomicInteger(in.booleanValue() ? 1 : 0);
270      if (outType == AtomicLong.class) return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> (O) new AtomicLong(in.booleanValue() ? 1L : 0L);
271      if (outType == BigDecimal.class) return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> (O) BigDecimal.valueOf(in.booleanValue() ? 1L : 0L);
272      if (outType == BigInteger.class) return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> (O) BigInteger.valueOf(in.booleanValue() ? 1L : 0L);
273      return null;
274   }
275
276   private <O> Conversion<CharSequence, O> findNumberFromString(Class<O> outType) {
277      return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> {
278         var s = in.toString();
279         if (s.isEmpty() || "null".equals(s))
280            return null;
281         return (O) parseNumber(s, (Class<? extends Number>) outType);
282      };
283   }
284
285   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
286   // Boolean conversions
287   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
288
289   private <I, O> Conversion<I, O> findBooleanConversion(Class<I> inType) {
290      if (Number.class.isAssignableFrom(inType))
291         return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> (O) Boolean.valueOf(((Number) in).intValue() != 0);
292      return null;
293   }
294
295   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
296   // Character conversions
297   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
298
299   private <I, O> Conversion<I, O> findCharacterConversion(Class<I> inType) {
300      if (CharSequence.class.isAssignableFrom(inType))
301         return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> {
302            var s = in.toString();
303            if (s.length() != 1)
304               throw illegalArg("Cannot convert string of length {0} to char: ''{1}''", s.length(), s);
305            return (O) Character.valueOf(s.charAt(0));
306         };
307      if (Number.class.isAssignableFrom(inType))
308         return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> {
309            var s = in.toString();
310            return s.isEmpty() ? null : (O) Character.valueOf(s.charAt(0));
311         };
312      return null;
313   }
314
315   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
316   // String conversions
317   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
318
319   private <I> Conversion<I, String> findToStringConversion(Class<I> inType) {
320      if (inType.isArray()) {
321         if (inType == int[].class) return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> Arrays.toString((int[]) in);
322         if (inType == long[].class) return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> Arrays.toString((long[]) in);
323         if (inType == double[].class) return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> Arrays.toString((double[]) in);
324         if (inType == float[].class) return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> Arrays.toString((float[]) in);
325         if (inType == boolean[].class) return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> Arrays.toString((boolean[]) in);
326         if (inType == byte[].class) return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> Arrays.toString((byte[]) in);
327         if (inType == short[].class) return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> Arrays.toString((short[]) in);
328         if (inType == char[].class) return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> Arrays.toString((char[]) in);
329         return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> Arrays.deepToString((Object[]) in);
330      }
331      return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> in.toString();
332   }
333
334   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
335   // Enum conversions
336   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
337
338   private <I, O> Conversion<I, O> findEnumConversion(Class<I> inType, Class<O> outType) {
339      if (CharSequence.class.isAssignableFrom(inType))
340         return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> (O) Enum.valueOf((Class<Enum>) outType, in.toString());
341      return null;
342   }
343
344   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
345   // Optional conversions
346   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
347
348   private <I, O> Conversion<I, O> findOptionalConversion() {
349      return (Conversion<I, O>) (Conversion<Object, Optional<?>>) (in, memberOf, session, args) -> {
350         if (in instanceof Optional<?> opt) {
351            if (args.length == 0)
352               return opt;
353            return opt.map(x -> to(x, memberOf, session, args[0]));
354         }
355         if (args.length == 0)
356            return opt(in);
357         return opt(to(in, memberOf, session, args[0]));
358      };
359   }
360
361   /**
362    * Conversion to a primitive {@link OptionalInt}/{@link OptionalLong}/{@link OptionalDouble}.
363    *
364    * <p>
365    * Mirrors the {@link Optional} contract: a {@code null} input (or an empty optional of any flavor)
366    * yields the matching empty primitive optional; any other value is unwrapped (if it is itself an
367    * optional) and coerced to the matching boxed number before wrapping.
368    *
369    * @param out The target primitive-optional class.
370    * @return The conversion, never <jk>null</jk>.
371    */
372   private <I, O> Conversion<I, O> findPrimitiveOptionalConversion(Class<O> out) {
373      final Class<? extends Number> elementType;
374      if (out == OptionalInt.class)
375         elementType = Integer.class;
376      else if (out == OptionalLong.class)
377         elementType = Long.class;
378      else
379         elementType = Double.class;
380      return (Conversion<I, O>) (Conversion<Object, Object>) (in, memberOf, session, args) -> {
381         Object v = in;
382         if (v instanceof Optional<?> opt)
383            v = opt.orElse(null);
384         else if (v instanceof OptionalInt oi)
385            v = oi.isPresent() ? Integer.valueOf(oi.getAsInt()) : null;
386         else if (v instanceof OptionalLong ol)
387            v = ol.isPresent() ? Long.valueOf(ol.getAsLong()) : null;
388         else if (v instanceof OptionalDouble od)
389            v = od.isPresent() ? Double.valueOf(od.getAsDouble()) : null;
390         if (v == null)
391            return emptyPrimitiveOptional(out);
392         var n = (Number) to(v, memberOf, session, elementType);
393         if (n == null)
394            return emptyPrimitiveOptional(out);
395         if (out == OptionalInt.class)
396            return OptionalInt.of(n.intValue());
397         if (out == OptionalLong.class)
398            return OptionalLong.of(n.longValue());
399         return OptionalDouble.of(n.doubleValue());
400      };
401   }
402
403   private static Object emptyPrimitiveOptional(Class<?> out) {
404      if (out == OptionalInt.class)
405         return OptionalInt.empty();
406      if (out == OptionalLong.class)
407         return OptionalLong.empty();
408      return OptionalDouble.empty();
409   }
410
411   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
412   // Collection conversions
413   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
414
415   private <I, O> Conversion<I, O> findCollectionConversion(Class<I> inType, Class<O> outType) {
416      if (Collection.class.isAssignableFrom(inType) || inType.isArray()) {
417         return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> {
418            // Treat Object.class as "no element type" since it means untyped/raw and needs no element conversion.
419            var elemType = args.length > 0 && args[0] != Object.class ? args[0] : null;
420            if (elemType == null && !inType.isArray() && outType.isAssignableFrom(inType))
421               return (O) in;
422            var result = newCollection(outType);
423            if (Collection.class.isAssignableFrom(inType)) {
424               for (var elem : (Collection<?>) in)
425                  result.add(elemType != null ? to(elem, elemType) : elem);
426            } else {
427               var len = Array.getLength(in);
428               for (var i = 0; i < len; i++) {
429                  var elem = Array.get(in, i);
430                  result.add(elemType != null ? to(elem, elemType) : elem);
431               }
432            }
433            return (O) result;
434         };
435      }
436      return null;
437   }
438
439   private Collection<Object> newCollection(Class<?> outType) {
440      if (outType == List.class || outType == Collection.class || outType == Iterable.class /* HTT: Iterable is a supertype of Collection so findCollectionConversion never passes Iterable as outType */ || outType == AbstractList.class)
441         return new ArrayList<>();
442      if (outType == Set.class || outType == LinkedHashSet.class || outType == AbstractSet.class)
443         return new LinkedHashSet<>();
444      if (outType == SortedSet.class || outType == NavigableSet.class || outType == TreeSet.class)
445         return new TreeSet<>();
446      if (outType == Queue.class || outType == Deque.class || outType == LinkedList.class)
447         return new LinkedList<>();
448      return newInstanceOrDefault(outType, ArrayList::new);
449   }
450
451   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
452   // Map conversions
453   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
454
455   private <I, O> Conversion<I, O> findMapConversion(Class<I> inType, Class<O> outType) {
456      if (Map.class.isAssignableFrom(inType)) {
457         return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> {
458            // Treat Object.class as "no key/value type" since it means untyped/raw and needs no element conversion.
459            var keyType = args.length > 0 && args[0] != Object.class ? args[0] : null;
460            var valType = args.length > 1 && args[1] != Object.class ? args[1] : null;
461            if (keyType == null && outType.isAssignableFrom(inType))
462               return (O) in;
463            var result = newMap(outType);
464            ((Map<?, ?>) in).forEach((k, v) -> result.put(
465               keyType != null ? to(k, keyType) : k,
466               valType != null ? to(v, valType) : v
467            ));
468            return (O) result;
469         };
470      }
471      return null;
472   }
473
474   private Map<Object, Object> newMap(Class<?> outType) {
475      if (outType == Map.class || outType == LinkedHashMap.class || outType == AbstractMap.class)
476         return new LinkedHashMap<>();
477      if (outType == SortedMap.class || outType == NavigableMap.class || outType == TreeMap.class)
478         return new TreeMap<>();
479      if (outType == HashMap.class)
480         return new HashMap<>();
481      return newInstanceOrDefault(outType, LinkedHashMap::new);
482   }
483
484   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
485   // Array conversions
486   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
487
488   private <I, O> Conversion<I, O> findArrayConversion(Class<I> inType, Class<O> outType) {
489      if (Collection.class.isAssignableFrom(inType) || inType.isArray()) {
490         var componentType = outType.getComponentType();
491         // For array→array, validate that element-level conversion is possible.
492         // Skip the pre-check for Object[] — runtime elements may be of a more specific type.
493         // Collections use runtime element types so we skip the pre-check there too.
494         if (inType.isArray()) {
495            var inComponentType = inType.getComponentType();
496            // Primitive component types are auto-boxed by Array.get(), so skip the canConvert check.
497            // Otherwise verify that element-level conversion is possible before returning a lambda.
498            if (!inComponentType.isPrimitive()
499                  && inComponentType != componentType
500                  && inComponentType != Object.class
501                  && !canConvert(inComponentType, componentType))
502               return null;
503         }
504         return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> {
505            if (Collection.class.isAssignableFrom(inType)) {
506               var list = (Collection<?>) in;
507               var arr = Array.newInstance(componentType, list.size());
508               var i = 0;
509               for (var elem : list)
510                  Array.set(arr, i++, to(elem, memberOf, session, componentType));
511               return (O) arr;
512            }
513            var len = Array.getLength(in);
514            var arr = Array.newInstance(componentType, len);
515            for (var i = 0; i < len; i++)
516               Array.set(arr, i, to(Array.get(in, i), memberOf, session, componentType));
517            return (O) arr;
518         };
519      }
520      return null;
521   }
522
523   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
524   // Special-case conversions
525   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
526
527   private <I, O> Conversion<I, O> findSpecialConversion(Class<I> inType, Class<O> outType) {
528      if (inType == String.class && outType == TimeZone.class)
529         return (Conversion<I, O>) (Conversion<String, TimeZone>) (in, memberOf, session, args) -> TimeZone.getTimeZone(in);
530      if (TimeZone.class.isAssignableFrom(inType) && outType == String.class)
531         return (Conversion<I, O>) (Conversion<TimeZone, String>) (in, memberOf, session, args) -> in.getID();
532      if (inType == String.class && outType == Locale.class)
533         return (Conversion<I, O>) (Conversion<String, Locale>) (in, memberOf, session, args) -> Locale.forLanguageTag(in.replace('_', '-'));
534      if (CharSequence.class.isAssignableFrom(inType) && outType == Boolean.class)
535         return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> {
536            var s = in.toString();
537            if (s.isEmpty() || "null".equals(s))
538               return null;
539            return (O) Boolean.valueOf(s);
540         };
541      if (CharSequence.class.isAssignableFrom(inType) && outType == byte[].class)
542         return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> (O) in.toString().getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8);
543      return null;
544   }
545
546   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
547   // Reflection: static factory methods
548   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
549
550   private <I, O> Conversion<I, O> findStaticFactory(Class<I> inType, Class<O> outType) {
551      var ci = info(outType);
552
553      for (var name : FACTORY_METHOD_NAMES) {
554         var opt = findStaticMethod(ci, name, inType, outType);
555         if (opt.isPresent())
556            return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> opt.get().invoke(null, in);
557      }
558
559      // Walk the type hierarchy (superclasses then interfaces) so that e.g. InputStreamReader
560      // can be passed to a method declared as fromReader(Reader r).
561      for (Class<?> c = inType; c != null && c != Object.class; c = c.getSuperclass()) {
562         var inName = c.getSimpleName();
563         for (var prefix : new String[]{"from", "for", "parse"}) {
564            var opt = findStaticMethod(ci, prefix + inName, inType, outType);
565            if (opt.isPresent())
566               return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> opt.get().invoke(null, in);
567         }
568      }
569      for (var iface : allInterfaces(inType)) {
570         var inName = iface.getSimpleName();
571         for (var prefix : new String[]{"from", "for", "parse"}) {
572            var opt = findStaticMethod(ci, prefix + inName, inType, outType);
573            if (opt.isPresent())
574               return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> opt.get().invoke(null, in);
575         }
576      }
577
578      return null;
579   }
580
581   private static List<Class<?>> allInterfaces(Class<?> c) {
582      var result = new ArrayList<Class<?>>();
583      for (var x = c; x != null; x = x.getSuperclass())
584         for (var iface : x.getInterfaces())
585            collectInterfaces(iface, result);
586      return result;
587   }
588
589   private static void collectInterfaces(Class<?> iface, List<Class<?>> result) {
590      if (!result.contains(iface)) {
591         result.add(iface);
592         for (var parent : iface.getInterfaces())
593            collectInterfaces(parent, result);
594      }
595   }
596
597   private Optional<MethodInfo> findStaticMethod(ClassInfo ci, String name, Class<?> inType, Class<?> outType) {
598      return ci.getPublicMethod(m ->
599         m.isStatic()
600         && m.isNotDeprecated()
601         && m.hasName(name)
602         && m.getParameterCount() == 1
603         && m.getParameterTypes().get(0).isAssignableFrom(inType)
604         && m.hasReturnTypeParent(outType)
605         // Exclude generic Object-param factory methods (e.g. List.of(E)) when input is not Object,
606         // since type erasure makes E appear as Object at runtime, causing false matches.
607         && (inType == Object.class || m.getParameterTypes().get(0).inner() != Object.class)
608      );
609   }
610
611   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
612   // Reflection: public constructors
613   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
614
615   private <I, O> Conversion<I, O> findConstructorConversion(Class<I> inType, Class<O> outType) {
616      if (outType.getEnclosingClass() != null && !Modifier.isStatic(outType.getModifiers())) {
617         var enclosing = outType.getEnclosingClass();
618         var opt = info(outType).getPublicConstructor(c ->
619            c.getParameterCount() == 2
620            && c.isNotDeprecated()
621            && c.getParameterTypes().get(0).inner() == enclosing
622            && c.getParameterTypes().get(1).isAssignableFrom(inType)
623         );
624         if (opt.isPresent()) {
625            var ctor = opt.get();
626            return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> ctor.newInstance(memberOf, in);
627         }
628      }
629
630      var opt = info(outType).getPublicConstructor(c ->
631         c.getParameterCount() == 1
632         && c.isNotDeprecated()
633         && c.getParameterTypes().get(0).isAssignableFrom(inType)
634      );
635      if (opt.isPresent()) {
636         var ctor = opt.get();
637         return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> ctor.newInstance(in);
638      }
639      return null;
640   }
641
642   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
643   // Reflection: toX() instance methods
644   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
645
646   private <I, O> Conversion<I, O> findToXMethod(Class<I> inType, Class<O> outType) {
647      // Use getNameReadable() so that array types use "Array" suffix (e.g. "toStringArray" for String[]).
648      // Use equalsIgnoreCase to match Mutaters' behavior (e.g. "toByteArray" matches "tobyteArray" from byte[]).
649      var methodName = "to" + info(outType).getNameReadable();
650      var opt = info(inType).getPublicMethod(m ->
651         m.isNotStatic()
652         && m.isNotDeprecated()
653         && m.getParameterCount() == 0
654         && m.getNameSimple().equalsIgnoreCase(methodName)
655         && m.hasReturnTypeParent(outType)
656      );
657      if (opt.isPresent()) {
658         var method = opt.get();
659         return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> method.invoke(in);
660      }
661      return null;
662   }
663
664   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
665   // Helpers
666   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
667
668   private <T> T newInstanceOrDefault(Class<?> type, java.util.function.Supplier<T> defaultSupplier) {
669      var opt = info(type).getPublicConstructor(c -> c.getParameterCount() == 0);
670      if (opt.isPresent()) {
671         var ctor = opt.get();
672         try {
673            return ctor.newInstance();
674         } catch (@SuppressWarnings("unused") Exception e) { // HTT: constructor would have to throw to reach here
675            return defaultSupplier.get(); // HTT
676         }
677      }
678      return defaultSupplier.get();
679   }
680}
